title: Aurora Notebook — Sand
summary: Aurora notebook in sand; built in Canada for daily use.

content.text:
# Aurora Notebook — Sand

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Aurora Notebook — Sand is designed for the long haul, with office-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Canada.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
